🪑
Patent-Pending Technology

EventSeater

The world's only double-blind voting system for drama-free seating charts. The complete event management tool.

Not just weddings — any event. Birthday parties, reunions, galas, corporate retreats, holiday dinners.

The Problem

Seating Charts Are a Nightmare.
We Fixed That.

Every host knows the pain: Uncle Frank can't sit near Aunt Carol, the college friends want their own table, and your mom has "opinions." EventSeater solves this with a patent-pending double-blind voting system — guests express preferences anonymously, and the algorithm does the hard work.

🔒 Double-Blind Means Double-Protected

Votes are completely anonymous — no guest ever sees who voted for or against them. Even the host never sees individual negative-preference votes. Couples vote together as a "super-node" — treated as one atomic unit so they're always seated side-by-side. The only thing anyone sees is an anonymous count of how many people want to sit near them.
How It Works

From RSVP to Seating Chart in Four Steps

Step 1
📨

Invite Guests

Share your event code. Guests RSVP, set plus-one status, choose a profile, and select meal preferences.

→
Step 2
🗳️

Anonymous Voting

Each guest votes on who they'd like near — or apart from. Couples vote as a "super-node." Votes can be changed anytime before the host's deadline.

→
Step 3
🧠

AI Optimization

Our optimization algorithm builds the optimal arrangement, respecting all preferences and hard constraints.

→
Step 4
🪑

Reveal Day-Of

Guests discover seats at the event. If someone backs out, the chart instantly regenerates.

Double-Blind Voting
Profile & Invite Code

⚡ Instant Regeneration

If someone changes their RSVP or backs out — even day-of — the seating chart instantly regenerates. The host, venue, and every vendor with access see the update in real time. No manual reshuffling. No panic.
Guest Experience

Everything a Guest Needs in One App

Guests manage all events from a single screen — RSVP, vote on seating, suggest songs, coordinate rides, share flights, and chat. Each member has a social profile and a professional profile — they choose which to show per event.

Guest View

Track All Your Events

See every event you're hosting or attending in one place. Update RSVP status any time — the host and seating chart update instantly. Guests invite their own plus-one right in the app by sharing an invite code — no extra work for the host.

Full details at a glance: date, location, attire, table count, plus-one policy, RSVP and voting deadlines.

Dual profiles: Social for family reunions. Professional for corporate galas. You choose per event.

Social Features

Songs, Rides, Flights & Chat

DJ Song Requests: Search and suggest songs. Guests upvote favorites. The DJ gets a live crowd-sourced playlist.

Ridesharing: Offer or request rides from other guests — departure times, seat counts, no leaving the app.

Flight tracking: Destination events? Share flight info. Everyone tracks arrivals in real time.

Built-in messaging: Chat with guests right inside the app. No separate group texts.

Host Experience

Full Control for the Host. Zero Hassle.

Create events in minutes, track RSVPs in real time, set policies with one tap, and push last-minute changes directly to every guest's phone.

Host View

Your Event Command Center

Live RSVP dashboard: Confirmed, maybe, declined, pending — all in real time.

Event policies: Plus-one rules, meal options, party favors, co-hosts, sharing permissions — one tap.

Real-time messaging: Push notifications to all guests instantly. Venue changes, weather alerts, day-of updates.

Full control: The host can assign specific guests to specific tables — like the wedding party or VIPs — and the algorithm only runs among those not already assigned. Manual assignments are locked in and never moved.

Deadlines & reminders: The host sets both an RSVP-by date and a vote-by date. One tap sends push reminders to anyone who hasn't voted yet — no chasing people down manually.

Votes are flexible: Guests can update their seating votes at any time before the voting deadline closes. Changed your mind about sitting near someone? Just re-vote.

Floor Plans & Vendors

Design Your Venue. Manage Your Vendors.

Interactive floor plans from your phone — tables, bars, stages, dance floors, and more. Invite vendors and control exactly what each one sees.

Venues & Vendors

Floor Plans + Vendor Marketplace

Mobile floor plan editor: Drag-and-drop round, rectangular, and cocktail tables. Plus bars, stages, podiums, dance floors, buffets, entrances, speakers, and more.

Granular vendor access: The host controls exactly what each vendor sees. DJ gets the playlist tab. Caterer gets guest details and meal selections. Each vendor gets a role and tab-level permissions.

Always up-to-date: Vendors with access always see the latest seating chart. No emailing outdated spreadsheets. Export as PDF or image anytime.

At launch: Host-to-vendor payments and a vendor marketplace to discover, compare, and book the right vendors — available at launch.

The Complete Event Platform

Double-Blind Voting

Guest Ridesharing

Pricing

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Small events are free. All features are included in every plan — no paywalls, no feature gating. Pricing is based purely on total guest count.

🎉 Small Events Are Always Free

Hosting a dinner party, small birthday, or casual get-together with 25 or fewer guests? It's completely free — full double-blind voting, seating chart generation, RSVP tracking, messaging, and more. No credit card required. No trial period. Just free.
Technology

Patent-Pending Algorithm

EventSeater's core uses advanced optimization over a weighted affinity graph — the same class of optimization used in chip design and protein folding. Couples vote as "super-nodes." Negative preferences create hard-constraint veto edges that can never be overridden.

⚙️ Patent-Pending
Inventor: John A. Schelstrate

Claim 1

Double-Blind Preference Voting System — weighted affinity graph with coupled super-nodes, veto-override constraints.

Claim 2

Mobile-Native Interactive Seating Chart Design System — touch-driven floor plan editor with environmental proximity tags, dual-mode assignment, PDF/PNG export, and real-time sync.
